nasb.text: All your rulers have fled together, And have been captured without the bow; All of you who were found were taken captive together, Though they had fled far away.

esv.text: All your leaders have fled together; without the bow they were captured. All of you who were found were captured, though they had fled far away.

cnv.text: 你們所有的官長都一起逃跑； 他們因沒有弓箭而被俘擄， 你們中間所有被找到的都一起被俘擄， 雖然他們已逃到遠方去。

ccb.text: 你们的官长一起逃跑， 一箭未发便束手就缚， 逃到远方的也一同被擒。

csbs.text: 你所有的统领一同逃亡， 弓未拉开就被抓住； 你们所有被发现的人， 虽然逃到远方也一同被抓住。
